rules.name: allow-local-development
rules.description: Allow loopback traffic for local development and health checks.

rules.name: allow-trusted-private-networks
rules.description: Permit sensitive device and user operations from private network ranges.

rules.name: deny-untrusted-admin-write-operations
rules.description: Block administrative mutations unless an earlier trusted-network allow rule matched.

rules.name: deny-untrusted-device-token-exchange
rules.description: Restrict device token exchange to explicitly allowed network ranges.
